items.briefing:
A new report highlights a growing trust gap in how Australian and New Zealand organisations handle consultations around data and security practices, suggesting many people remain uncertain about how their information is being managed. Separately, research from Acronis warns that AI is helping cybercriminals launch attacks faster and at greater scale than before — a trend relevant to any Australian organisation, regardless of size.

On a positive note, Truecaller has joined the GSMA industry body to help reduce scam calls globally, which may eventually benefit Australians dealing with phone-based fraud.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation hasn't reviewed its privacy and data handling communications recently, now is a good time — clear, transparent messaging helps build staff and customer trust.

featured.title: URSYS launches secure Layer 2 Starlink for remote sites
featured.quote: Remote Australian operators can secure Starlink traffic, addressing critical infrastructure vulnerability in isolated regions.
